items.title: Nepal’s new PM gives message to nation in rap, ahead of swearing in
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: UN human rights chief calls on US to conclude probe into Iran school strike
items.dek: The strike - which killed at least 168 people, mostly children - "evoked a visceral horror", Volker Türk said.
items.body: The strike - which killed at least 168 people, mostly children - "evoked a visceral horror", Volker Türk said.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Trump's paused attack on Iran's energy - for diplomacy or escalation?
items.dek: The US president's commitment to deadlines is fluid but he uses them for a purpose, writes the BBC's James Landale.
items.body: The US president's commitment to deadlines is fluid but he uses them for a purpose, writes the BBC's James Landale.
items.author: IriLine Desk
